What's Included in the Mod

💰

Unlimited Coins & Gems

Buy every skin, hat, and item in the shop from day one. No grinding required.

👒

All Skins & Hats Unlocked

Every cosmetic from Skeleton Bear to Royal Cape is available immediately.

🚫

Zero Advertisements

No pop-ups, video ads, or banner ads. Pure uninterrupted gameplay.

🛡️

Anti-Ban Protection

The mod includes protections to reduce risk during online sessions.

🌍

All 6 Worlds Accessible

Turtletown, Snow Valley, Desert, Giant House, The Hive, and Mole Mines all unlocked.

👥

Full Multiplayer Support

Co-op play, invite codes, and online sessions work exactly as in the official game.

How to Install — Step by Step

The full install takes about 5 minutes on any Android device. No root or special tools needed.

1

Download the APK File

Tap the green Download button on this page to save the Super Bear Adventure Mod APK v12.1.5 to your device. The file is 221 MB in size.

2

Enable Unknown Sources

Go to Settings → Security (or Privacy on Android 8+) → enable "Install from Unknown Sources" or when prompted, tap "Allow from this source" for your browser.

3

Open the APK File

Open your Downloads folder using your file manager app. Tap the super-bear-adventure-mod-apk.apk file to start the installation.

4

Tap Install

The Android install screen will appear. Review the permissions and tap "Install". The installation takes about 10–20 seconds.

5

Launch the Game

Tap "Open" or find the Super Bear Adventure icon on your home screen. Enjoy unlimited coins, all skins unlocked, and no ads from the first launch.

Having trouble? If Android blocks the installation, go to Settings → Apps → Special App Access → Install Unknown Apps. See our full install guide for device-specific help, or the troubleshooting guide for error fixes.

Install on Your Specific Device

Samsung Galaxy (S & A Series)

One UI — specific steps for Samsung devices

Xiaomi & Redmi (MIUI)

MIUI has extra unknown sources steps

Android 14 & 15

Per-app install permission on newer Android

BlueStacks (PC / Mac)

Sideload the APK into BlueStacks emulator

LDPlayer (PC)

LDPlayer setup and performance tips

iOS / iPhone

iOS alternative methods (no APK for iOS)

Is This APK Safe?

The mod APK v12.1.5 has been scanned by multiple antivirus engines and contains no malware, spyware, or harmful code. It does not require root access and uses the same game permissions as the official Play Store version.

Read full safety report Security analysis guide

Frequently Asked Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Is the Super Bear Adventure Mod APK free to download?
Yes, it is completely free. There are no hidden charges, subscriptions, or in-app purchases. You get unlimited coins, all skins, and no ads at zero cost.
What version of Android do I need?
The mod APK requires Android 5.1+. It works on all major Android devices including Samsung Galaxy, Xiaomi, OnePlus, Google Pixel, and more.
Will I lose my progress when installing the mod?
If you already have the official game installed, uninstall it first (or install over it if signatures allow). Your cloud-saved progress may carry over. For safety, read our guide on how to install without losing progress.
Does this mod APK require root access?
No root required. The Super Bear Adventure Mod APK installs like any standard Android app. No Magisk, no custom recovery, no jailbreak needed.
Is the APK safe — no viruses or malware?
The APK has been scanned with VirusTotal and multiple antivirus engines. It contains no malware, spyware, or harmful code. The mod is based on the official v12.1.5 build from Earthkwak Games with mod modifications only. Read our full safety report at /safety/ for details.
Can I play multiplayer with the mod APK?
Yes. The mod retains full multiplayer functionality. You can join co-op sessions, use invite codes, and play online with friends just like the official game.
How do I update the mod when a new version releases?
Download the new APK from this page and install it over the existing one. Your progress will be preserved. Never uninstall before installing the update.
Why is my phone blocking the installation?
Android blocks APK installs from unknown sources by default for security. Go to Settings → Security → Unknown Sources (Android 7 and below) or Settings → Apps → Special App Access → Install Unknown Apps (Android 8+) and allow your browser or file manager.
